title: ERGSN Product Catalog Entry
description: Single row of data/products.json — one physical product or service offering. Run `npm run build:products` after editing.

id.description: Stable lowercase slug, used as DOM id and referenced by chat + compare. Never change after publish.

sector.description: Sector the product is listed under. Controls which grid renders the card.

active.description: Set to false to hide from live site without deleting the entry (useful for drafts).

sub.description: One-line subtitle shown on the card and in the modal header.

desc.description: Paragraph-length description shown in the modal body. Markdown not supported — use straight text.

img.description: Path to main product image relative to site root. Either .jpg or .webp fallback; .webp auto-detected if sibling file exists.

specs.description: Array of [label, value] tuples for the Technical Specifications table.

features.description: Bullet list of Key Features & Benefits.

tags.description: Industry tags for AI Partner Match scoring. One or more of: finance, healthcare, tech, education, hospitality, government, manufacturing, logistics, retail, energy.

scale.description: Volume scale buckets — used by matching. Any subset of: s (small), m (medium), l (large), xl (extra large).

maker.description: Korean maker legal name (displayed as 'Manufactured by ...').

cardTag.description: Short tag shown above the model name on the product card, e.g. 'Entry Mid-Sized Office'.

matchDesc.description: One-line description used by the AI Partner Match result card.

coming.description: Tag as 'coming soon' — shown in Match but not in main grid until true.
